SDD \u00a78.3 for the function-level contract and \u00a78.3 for the seven      invariants enforced here:      INV_VolumeConserved   \u2014 `produceComponent` rejects splits whose total                              volume exceeds the parent unit.      INV_RecallPropagates  \u2014 `reportAdverseEvent(DonorPositive, donorHash)`                              atomically recalls every component derived                              from any donation by that donor.      INV_NoExpiredTransfusion \u2014 `crossMatch` and `recordTransfusion`                                 revert once `block.timestamp >= expiresAt`.      INV_ColdChainGate     \u2014 `transferComponentCustody` with an out-of-range                              temperature flips status to `Recalled`.      INV_RoleScoping       \u2014 every state-changing function is gated by                              exactly one HemaRegistry role.      INV_DonorHashImmutable \u2014 `donorIdHash` is set once in                               `registerDonation` and never written again.      INV_CertificateMonotonic \u2014 enforced in `HemaCertificate`.      Per SDD \u00a711.4 nothing personally-identifiable is stored on-chain.      Donor and patient identifiers MUST be hashed off-chain as      `keccak256(DNI + salt_institucional)`.","kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"HemaTraceability","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Core HemaChain contract: donations, screening, components,
